thig3.2:1.1: Four times, five, I ran amok from my dwelling,
thig3.2:1.3: having gained no peace of awareness,
thig3.2:2.1: So I went to a trustworthy nun.
thig3.2:3.3: For seven days I sat in one spot,
thig3.2:3.5: On the eighth, I stretched out my legs,
thig3.2:3.6: having burst the mass of darkness.
